headline: Assessing Blackstone (BX) Valuation After Oppenheimer Upgrade And Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: Blackstone (BX) is back in focus after Oppenheimer raised its rating to Outperform, citing a recent selloff, attractive valuation and what it views as strong real estate and operating performance. See our latest analysis for Blackstone. That upgrade comes after a sharp pullback, with a 90 day share price return of a 20.4% decline and a year to date share price return of a 20.45% decline, even though the 5 year total shareholder return is 88.46%, so recent momentum is rebuilding from a lower...
